extension.summary: Trigger HDMI CEC power commands from Kodi JSON-RPC
extension.description: Exposes simple script actions (on/off) that can be invoked through Addons.ExecuteAddon over Kodi's JSON-RPC API. Pass action=on to send CECActivateSource or action=off to send CECStandby.
extension.news:
v0.1.6 - Reverted OFF action to Kodi-native CECStandby for adapter compatibility - Removed runtime dependency on external cec-client command execution
v0.1.5 - Improved cec-client execution by appending quit and handling command timeouts - OFF command no longer treats cec-client timeout as missing binary
v0.1.4 - Added explicit cec-client path resolution for OSMC (/usr/osmc/bin/cec-client)
v0.1.3 - OFF action now targets TV directly via cec-client standby 0 - Keeps CECStandby as fallback when cec-client is unavailable
v0.1.2 - Improved addon log format with structured event markers - Updated Python typing for Kodi runtime compatibility
v0.1.1 - Repackaged for clean install testing
v0.1.0 - Initial release - Supports on/off CEC power commands via Addons.ExecuteAddon JSON-RPC
